description: Search for or read a FHIR DiagnosticReport resource including lab results, pathology, and imaging reports. For direct read, provide _id alone. For search, provide patient, subject, identifier, encounter, or based-on. If filtering by a plain-language report concept, resolve the code with code_search before using code, category, or type-style filters. Use category to filter by discipline (e.g. LAB, RAD). For individual values over time, prefer linked or direct Observation resources.

searchParams._id: DiagnosticReport resource ID — performs direct read when provided alone
searchParams.based-on: Reference to the service request (order) that triggered this report
searchParams.date: Clinically relevant date or date range
searchParams.media: Reference to media (images) included in the report
searchParams.performer: Who is responsible for the report
searchParams.status: Report status: registered, partial, preliminary, final, amended, corrected, appended, cancelled, entered-in-error, unknown
searchParams.subject: Subject of the report (Patient or Group)
